Post Malone.Name: Average
Post Malone.Comment: honestly a good cookie, can easily have a lot of them. lost only a little on the sweetness.

Space Dunk.Name: nari
Space Dunk.Comment: this is gross and tastes too artificial

Space Dunk.Name: mina
Space Dunk.Comment: smells really strong, but it's not actually that bad

Space Dunk.Name: jayjay
Space Dunk.Comment: meh, it's ok. not a fan of cheesecake

Space Dunk.Name: lola
Space Dunk.Comment: originally a 7.5, potent smell and strong aftertaste brought down flavor

Space Dunk.Name: drae
Space Dunk.Comment: if it was this or no cookie, still not sure which I'd pick

Space Dunk.Name: ausi
Space Dunk.Comment: in a 1 to 1 comparison, this is better than a normal Oreo. but I could have 5 regular Oreos and only 1 of these

Space Dunk.Name: Average
Space Dunk.Comment: very split here — you either like it or hate it. potent smell too.

Tiramisu.Name: mina
Tiramisu.Comment: I wouldn't like, NOT eat it. also very mild

Tiramisu.Name: nattle
Tiramisu.Comment: it's very mild and it doesn't smell good!!

Tiramisu.Name: joro
Tiramisu.Comment: the thinness brought it UP. this is not a good tiramisu

Tiramisu.Name: ausi
Tiramisu.Comment: way *eyeroll* better than a normal Oreo

Tiramisu.Name: Average
Tiramisu.Comment: there isn't enough filling and it's a pretty mild flavor

Pokémon Strawberry Creme.Name: jayjay
Pokémon Strawberry Creme.Comment: artificial-ish and tastes like a strawberry poptart

Pokémon Strawberry Creme.Name: juk
Pokémon Strawberry Creme.Comment: absolutely tastes like a strawberry poptart and god are they awful

Pokémon Strawberry Creme.Name: joro
Pokémon Strawberry Creme.Comment: I have regret for putting this whole thing in my mouth

Birthday Cake.Name: lola
Birthday Cake.Comment: best one we've had so far. I'd eat these interchangeably with a normal Oreo

Birthday Cake.Name: nattle
Birthday Cake.Comment: 6 or less cookies, it's an 8. more than that and it's a 6

Birthday Cake.Name: tron
Birthday Cake.Comment: it was fine until I tasted it

Birthday Cake.Name: Average
Birthday Cake.Comment: mixed reviews, tasted like frosting, which you either like or you don't

Coca-Cola.Name: lola
Coca-Cola.Comment: lots to say, not a huge fan

Coca-Cola.Name: juk
Coca-Cola.Comment: took a lot of pondering, bumped up from a 5.5

Coca-Cola.Name: jayjay
Coca-Cola.Comment: was a 9 but the aftertaste brought it down. honestly, with a single sip of milk I'd be sold.

Cinnamon Bun.Name: Average
Cinnamon Bun.Comment: a bit sweet, probably better with milk. if you're less inclined to the chocolate flavors, then this is a hit.

S'mOREO.Name: nattle
S'mOREO.Comment: I could eat all of those

S'mOREO.Name: calo
S'mOREO.Comment: if it was closer to an actual s'more, it would be over an 8. but it's missing the chocolate.

S'mOREO.Name: aram
S'mOREO.Comment: tastes veeerryy similar to a regular Oreo

S'mOREO.Name: Average
S'mOREO.Comment: not enough chocolate taste. similar to the OG oreo!

Irish Crème.Name: Average
Irish Crème.Comment: tastes very similar to irish crème (bailey's) so if we we're judging on accuracy of flavor then 10/10. but we aren't, and we all learned we don't like irish crème by itself much.

Blueberry Raspberry.Name: aram
Blueberry Raspberry.Comment: smells like the dentist to me

Blueberry Raspberry.Name: tron
Blueberry Raspberry.Comment: first bite was off-putting, but it got better

Blueberry Raspberry.Name: joro
Blueberry Raspberry.Comment: it's not horrible but it's not good. it's like a jolly rancher

Blueberry Raspberry.Name: Average
Blueberry Raspberry.Comment: arman clearly has some dental PTSD

Matcha and Fig.Name: nattle
Matcha and Fig.Comment: it's like a blank canvas of a cookie

Matcha and Fig.Name: Average
Matcha and Fig.Comment: lack of filling has made it tough to really taste much

Dark Chocolate.Name: nattle
Dark Chocolate.Comment: it just tastes like the cracker

Crystal Grape and Peach.Name: calo
Crystal Grape and Peach.Comment: I tend to like things that are medicinal, in regards to flavors

Crystal Grape and Peach.Name: jayjay
Crystal Grape and Peach.Comment: reminded me of a PEZ flavor, but worse

Crystal Grape and Peach.Name: Average
Crystal Grape and Peach.Comment: strong fruit smell and medicinal taste. just not great.

Cheese.Name: nattle
Cheese.Comment: tastes like a normal Oreo, but slightly worse because I know there's cheese in it

Cheese.Name: juk
Cheese.Comment: just kinda worse than a regular Oreo

Cheese.Name: Average
Cheese.Comment: expected worse, but it's neither super cheesy nor super different

Peanut Butter.Name: mina
Peanut Butter.Comment: tastes like those square orange peanut butter crackers

Peanut Butter.Name: lola
Peanut Butter.Comment: that's def peanut butter, like a Reese's

Chocolate Covered Pretzel.Name: tron
Chocolate Covered Pretzel.Comment: practically just a golden Oreo *everyone disagreed*

Chocolate Covered Pretzel.Name: nari
Chocolate Covered Pretzel.Comment: this might be the best so far

Ice Cream Matcha.Name: jayjay
Ice Cream Matcha.Comment: the "cool" effect is actually really cool. flavor is decent enough that the novelty is fun

Ice Cream Matcha.Name: lola
Ice Cream Matcha.Comment: why's it tingly? why is it doing that?

Ice Cream Matcha.Name: juk
Ice Cream Matcha.Comment: (adjusted from a 2) I don't like matcha AND the smell is off-putting

Ice Cream Matcha.Name: Average
Ice Cream Matcha.Comment: the novelty of the cooling aftertaste is definitely getting bonus points, and the flavor is good enough to be simple yet tasty

White Cream.Name: jayjay
White Cream.Comment: it tastes very light but it's missing the mouth-filling part

White Cream.Name: Average
White Cream.Comment: not really much to not like about it, leaves you wanting just a bit more after eating

Selena Gomez.Name: juk
Selena Gomez.Comment: was a 6.25, got bumped. something wrong with the middle, too sweet

Selena Gomez.Name: jayjay
Selena Gomez.Comment: it's like the cinnamon bun one, but with chocolate

Selena Gomez.Name: Average
Selena Gomez.Comment: similar to the cinnamon bun one (not in a bad way)

Cherry Blossom Matcha.Name: jayjay
Cherry Blossom Matcha.Comment: nice floral aftertaste, cookie taste was too strong

Cherry Blossom Matcha.Name: Average
Cherry Blossom Matcha.Comment: like with all thins, the lack of filling was detrimental to the flavor. it got overpowered by the cookie. what could be tasted, however, was very good

Raspberry & Vanilla.Name: lola
Raspberry & Vanilla.Comment: not a fan of the blueberry aftertaste

Raspberry & Vanilla.Name: jayjay
Raspberry & Vanilla.Comment: initially really good but the aftertaste was a bit too fake tasting

Raspberry & Vanilla.Name: Average
Raspberry & Vanilla.Comment: a little sweet and the fruity taste was hit or miss. it did "different" well. also had a good filling ratio

Orange Chocolate.Name: mina
Orange Chocolate.Comment: misleading to call it orange spice due to lack of orange flavor

Orange Chocolate.Name: juk
Orange Chocolate.Comment: it's trying to be a Jaffa cake but it isn't

Orange Chocolate.Name: jayjay
Orange Chocolate.Comment: taste is meh, it's super dry, and smells almost off-putting. it's almost like those chocolates with orange filling, but worse

Orange Chocolate.Name: Average
Orange Chocolate.Comment: the smell isn't great, it's dry and lacks flavor. but it looks fun!

Lemon.Name: aram
Lemon.Comment: raised from a 6.25. I realized I would have more than one. but no more than 5 (if I was hungry)

Lemon.Name: jayjay
Lemon.Comment: thought was a bit sweeter than desired, very dessert-y

Lemon.Name: calo
Lemon.Comment: within the margin of error of a normal Oreo

Lemon.Name: Average
Lemon.Comment: back and forth about the sweetness level, so must've been just right. compared a lot to golden Oreos. the taste is very similar to a lemon shortbread

Blueberry Pie.Name: jayjay
Blueberry Pie.Comment: bit too fake tasting but still good

Blueberry Pie.Name: lola
Blueberry Pie.Comment: because I can no longer give a 10

Blueberry Pie.Name: calo
Blueberry Pie.Comment: really good for what it is

Blueberry Pie.Name: Average
Blueberry Pie.Comment: tastes legitimately close to a blueberry pie. lives up to the name! just on the sweeter side

Toffee Crunch.Name: tron
Toffee Crunch.Comment: because I bought them XD (I have an affinity for toffee)

Toffee Crunch.Name: Average
Toffee Crunch.Comment: very strong smell, tastes like toffee, mixed feelings about the "crunch". we have learned lane judges extremely incorrectly. the protection of the sanctity of the ranking system is tearing this group apart.

Apple Pie A La Mode.Name: juk
Apple Pie A La Mode.Comment: (derogatory) I'm not happy I'm giving it an 8

Apple Pie A La Mode.Name: jayjay
Apple Pie A La Mode.Comment: want a little more oomph but dang is it good

Apple Pie A La Mode.Name: Average
Apple Pie A La Mode.Comment: hasn't risen to the challenge, but it's still good. we all want just a bit more from it

Sesame Milk Shortbread.Name: jayjay
Sesame Milk Shortbread.Comment: tastes like a rice cake, but not in a super good way

Sesame Milk Shortbread.Name: Average
Sesame Milk Shortbread.Comment: they are objectively good, but just overall not a fan of the flavor itself

Reese's.Name: aram
Reese's.Comment: the flavors don't compliment each other as well as a normal Oreo, but it's still good

Reese's.Name: jayjay
Reese's.Comment: can taste the Nutter Butter (I like Nutter Butter) but wish it was more Reese's-ish

Reese's.Name: calo
Reese's.Comment: hard to eat but it's good

Reese's.Name: Average
Reese's.Comment: wish for more Reese's flavor, it's kind of heavy and hard to eat a lot of. but still a tasty cookie

Peony.Name: jayjay
Peony.Comment: the artificial aftertaste isn't fun, but the cookie is nice

Peony.Name: oli
Peony.Comment: would've been a lot better with tea

Peony.Name: Average
Peony.Comment: tastes mostly like the cookie, the artificial flavor hurt it

Crushed Vanilla.Name: aram
Crushed Vanilla.Comment: it makes me mad. it's so unsatisfying. the Oreo has a level of insatiability akin to a Listerine breath strip.

Crushed Vanilla.Name: jayjay
Crushed Vanilla.Comment: I could eat a lot of these so long as I don't get the aftertaste

Crushed Vanilla.Name: Average
Crushed Vanilla.Comment: Arman has led a crusade against these Oreos on the lack of inspiration from Mondelez. one band of peeps liked the cookie, the other did not

Mint.Name: jayjay
Mint.Comment: it's a Thin Mint. Oreo handled their business

Mint.Name: lola
Mint.Comment: still good but tastes like a worse Thin Mint

Mint.Name: Average
Mint.Comment: multiple comparisons to Thin Mints, for better or for worse

White Fudge Covered.Name: joro
White Fudge Covered.Comment: I'm so sorry but, this ain't it. way too heavy

White Fudge Covered.Name: Average
White Fudge Covered.Comment: very heavy feeling, pretty good but hard to eat. not down with the thickness

Loaded.Name: lola
Loaded.Comment: it's giving me more of what I like (the cream)

Loaded.Name: aram
Loaded.Comment: exact same as a normal Oreo

Loaded.Name: Average
Loaded.Comment: it tastes just like an Oreo, so basically an 8. points were added or subtracted based on the love of cream.

Milk Chocolate Covered.Name: drae
Milk Chocolate Covered.Comment: not as sweet as I thought it'd be

Milk Chocolate Covered.Name: jayjay
Milk Chocolate Covered.Comment: if it had sea salt, I'd eat 9-11 of them

Milk Chocolate Covered.Name: Average
Milk Chocolate Covered.Comment: not bad for all the chocolate in it, it's a pretty good cookie

Cookie Dough.Name: jayjay
Cookie Dough.Comment: I like it (I think) but it's a bit sweet and doesn't really taste like cookie dough. more like kinda bland choccy chip cookies

Cookie Dough.Name: oli
Cookie Dough.Comment: tastes somewhat like a graham cracker (I don't like graham crackers)

Cookie Dough.Name: aram
Cookie Dough.Comment: it's almost like a complex wine with notes of smokiness, cinnamon, etc.

Cookie Dough.Name: calo
Cookie Dough.Comment: no flavor, not dense like you'd expect cookie dough to be

Cookie Dough.Name: Average
Cookie Dough.Comment: a little too sweet and the flavor is good but lacking

Brown Sugar Bubble Tea.Name: jayjay
Brown Sugar Bubble Tea.Comment: made my throat feel like it does after having bubble tea! (am I allergic to bubble tea?)

Chocolate Ganache.Name: aram
Chocolate Ganache.Comment: bumped up from a 7.9 due to enjoying being able to eat more for less

Chocolate Ganache.Name: tron
Chocolate Ganache.Comment: I don't hate all chocolate (editor's note: he likes brownies)

Chocolate Ganache.Name: Average
Chocolate Ganache.Comment: this being a "Thin" was a better "form factor" for the flavor. Oreo did well with it and is reminiscent of a brownie

Sour Patch Kids Lime.Name: tron
Sour Patch Kids Lime.Comment: would be a 10 if it was Swedish Fish

Sour Patch Kids Lime.Name: Average
Sour Patch Kids Lime.Comment: a good throwback flavor, lacking in the sour department but a good cookie

Hazelnut.Name: mina
Hazelnut.Comment: cookie is too hard, can't taste the creme

Hazelnut.Name: jayjay
Hazelnut.Comment: uninspiring and taste no different from normal. the fact they're tiny upsets me because I have to eat more just to get an idea of them.

Hazelnut.Name: Average
Hazelnut.Comment: plain, boring, uninspiring. needs way more creme/hazelnut. higher scores came from the cookie.

Zero Sugar.Name: jayjay
Zero Sugar.Comment: this is the saddest excuse for an Oreo we've ever tried. I got no joy from this "cookie"

Zero Sugar.Name: lola
Zero Sugar.Comment: I don't taste a difference *EVERYONE disagreed*

Zero Sugar.Name: Average
Zero Sugar.Comment: lackluster filling, tastes kinda off-brand, plain

Cadbury Creme Egg.Name: calo
Cadbury Creme Egg.Comment: too much creme for this flavor

Cadbury Creme Egg.Name: jayjay
Cadbury Creme Egg.Comment: tastes very similar to a regular Oreo, just creme-ier

Cadbury Creme Egg.Name: Average
Cadbury Creme Egg.Comment: very similar to a regular Oreo, many agreed it was creamier. not much to the flavor though — its description was listed as '45% fondant', which was weird given the name?
